name: OnStarJS
postCreateCommand: corepack enable && COREPACK_ENABLE_DOWNLOAD_PROMPT=0 corepack install && pnpm setup && . ~/.bashrc && pnpm install && sudo apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y xvfb && pnpm add -g patchright && sudo npx patchright install-deps && chmod +x scripts/setup-env.sh && node scripts/setup-env.js
